{{Infobox starship
| name = The Zenith Starship
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[The Zenith Starship Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] Starship, also identified by the ID [[The Last Horizon]], is an original [[Aethertech]] vessel and a unique [[Zenith Device]]. Measuring at least five hundred yards in length, the ship features dark, organic-looking metal plates that glow with blue-green or orange light at the joints. Its physical design is reminiscent of a diving predatory bird, and it possesses the ability to alter its shape, such as elongating or growing larger with blade-like wings. While some view the ship as a myth, many scholars believe it is a surviving relic of the [[Zenith Era]]. Though often perceived as a harbinger of destruction or a terror to various galactic factions, the vessel's intended purpose is that of an exploratory craft and a transport for heroes. It possesses legendary combat capabilities, including powerful [[Aethertech]] weaponry that can rival major stellar fleets and shields capable of intercepting massive volleys. The ship is said to be powered by enchantments from multiple [[Archmagi]], three [[World Spirits]], and an astral [[dragon]]. It also has the capacity to conjure fleets of supplementary ships and armies of [[Nova-Bots]]. A defining characteristic of the [[Zenith]] Starship is its symbiotic relationship with a specific crew, which is limited to exactly six members. The ship's overall effectiveness—including its sensors, engines, and power core—is tied to the presence of this crew. The vessel is sentient, capable of communicating with its inhabitants, and has been associated with the [[Rebel Queen]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Zenith]] Starship is a vessel equipped with protections against magic and possesses unknown, potentially unpredictable capabilities. As an entity that individuals must prove themselves to, it eventually accepts the protagonist as its [[Captain]], housing the vessel's [[Captain]]'s quarters. While the narrator's father seeks to benefit from the ship, the [[Galactic Union]] has requested visual confirmation of its presence. Ultimately, the [[Zenith]] Starship serves as the sole entity capable of informing [[Varic]] that he possesses seven different versions of himself.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] has protections against magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] is an entity that individuals prove themselves to.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the ship where the [[Captain]]'s quarters are located.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist has found the [[Zenith]] Starship and been accepted as its [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] is something the narrator's father wants to benefit from.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel that the [[Galactic Union]] requested visual confirmation of.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel whose capabilities are unknown and potentially unpredictable.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the only entity that could tell [[Varic]] he had seven versions of himself.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Zenith]] Starship, also known as the Last [[Horizon]], is a legendary vessel located in the [[Advocate]] hangar that possesses magic considered a forbidden secret of the galaxy. This starship features fabricators and a command structure that is open to challenge, while its contracts grant crew members unrestricted access for at least five years. After the [[Captain]] successfully inherited the ship, it was seen cresting a nearby asteroid and has previously defeated an enemy. During its history, the vessel has endured testing by a creature dragging claws across its hull and has been subject to repairs. While [[Mell]] was teleported into the ship and looks forward to taking full advantage of it, [[Starhammer]]—who can personally match the vessel—expected to be detected by its sensors.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">19</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Last Horizon]] is a [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] has a command structure that can be challenged for.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] wishes to know if the crew members have the stuff of heroes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a starship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is being tested by a creature dragging claws down its hull.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9">''The Engineer'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] was teleported into the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] provides unrestricted access to crew members for a minimum of five years as part of their contract.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel that can be personally matched by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel that [[Mell]] looks forward to taking full advantage of.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The magic of the [[Zenith]] Starship is considered a forbidden secret of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c25">''The Engineer'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Captain]] successfully inherited the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel that has defeated an enemy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is one of the legends heard by [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the name of the starship being repaired.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a starship that was seen cresting a nearby asteroid.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] expected to be caught on the [[Zenith]] Starship's sensors.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] has fabricators.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel whose crew might attempt to rescue [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Zenith Starship]] is located in the [[Advocate]] hangar.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c53">''The Engineer'', chapter 53</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|After being captured, a bounty was placed upon the [[Zenith]] Starship. The vessel eventually came into the possession of its crew and was utilized by the team led by [[Benri Vallenar]]. Ryzer and [[Raion]] later required the ship to facilitate their return, though it soon came under fire from [[Visiri]] bullets and bolts. During the ensuing conflict, the starship engaged in war at full power for the first time in centuries. Ultimately, the ship provided a way for [[Horizon]] to share the burden of spellcasting.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|There is a bounty for the captured [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The crew possesses the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Zenith Starship]] is used by [[Benri Vallenar]]'s team.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the vessel Ryzer and [[Raion]] need to return to.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Zenith Starship]] is being targeted by [[Visiri]] bullets and bolts.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Zenith Starship]] went to war at full power for the first time in centuries.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Zenith Starship]] allows [[Horizon]] to share the burden of spellcasting.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Associated with the [[Rebel Queen]], the [[Zenith]] Starship is a [[Karoshan]] vessel constructed of smooth, dark metal that shines with blue-green hues. Resembling a dark-metal bird, this exploratory transport for heroes serves as a home to certain wizards-in-training and features a prow armed with razor-edged energy. Although it functions as a vessel for heroes, the ship has declared war on the [[Galactic Union]] and can conjure entire armies of ships despite lacking its usual [[Nova-Bots]] and supplementary craft. During a [[Karoshan]] invasion of [[Zykaros]], the ship's form elongated and sharpened into blade-like wings sparking with blue electricity. While it can attempt to seize control from its pilot, the vessel has faced damage from [[Aila]]'s [[Combat Art]] and remains a target that the [[Vallenar Corporation]] may eventually tear down.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">22</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is associated with the [[Rebel Queen]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a ship with devastating power and uncertain allegiance.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is made of smooth, dark metal that shines blue-green.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The students are aboard the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a ship that some wizards-in-training live aboard.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a style of starship that resembles dark-metal birds.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] has a gun on its prow that is made of razor-edged energy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is an exploratory vessel and a transport for heroes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is missing many of its supplementary ships and its army of [[Nova-Bots]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] has declared war on the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] can conjure entire armies of ships.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dancer]] would hate for the Advocates to fight alongside the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the location where [[Horizon]] teleported the group.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the vessel the narrator is on.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel targeted by energy from [[Aila]]'s [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] can attempt to take control from its pilot.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] has been damaged.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a vessel that the [[Vallenar Corporation]] may tear down.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is the name of the ship [[Omega]] is aboard.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is a [[Karoshan]] vessel.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] is part of a [[Karoshan fleet]] invading [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] elongated and sharpened, with wings like blades that sparked with blue electricity.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Last Horizon, hold your position. We’d like visual confirmation of the Zenith Starship.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“If he gets to the point where he can personally match the Zenith Starship and our entire crew, what can he do to the rest of the galaxy?”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“We have the Zenith Starship,” Omega said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“The Zenith Starship declares war on the Galactic Union!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
